name: CASH 4U PAWN
description_short: Small pawn shop in Federal Heights, CO specializing in gold, diamonds, and Swiss watches. Licensed for pawn and firearm transactions with 100% seller rating.
description_long:
CASH 4U PAWN is a small, independently operated pawn shop located in Federal Heights, Colorado, founded by Dani Mays, who grew up in the pawn business. The business operates as a dual-licensed establishment holding both pawn and firearm licenses reviewed by the Federal Heights Police Department. The company positions itself as a young, honest operation focused on fair dealings and customer care.

The shop specializes in buying and selling high-value items, with particular expertise in gold, diamonds, and Swiss watches. They also actively trade in electronics, power tools, and firearms. Their inventory spans a broad range of merchandise including jewelry, musical instruments, sporting goods, and miscellaneous items of value. Items are listed on the Buya.com marketplace platform, where they've built a track record of 451 items sold with a perfect 100% positive rating.

The business distinguishes itself through its claimed commitment to honesty, fair pricing, and customer service. Management emphasizes maintaining a clean, organized shop with knowledgeable staff. The company contact, Dani Mays, positions family values and professional assistance as core operating principles. Their presence on the Buya marketplace suggests they operate both brick-and-mortar and online sales channels.

As a small pawn operation, CASH 4U PAWN serves customers seeking quick cash for collateral-based loans or those looking to purchase secondhand high-value goods. The business model relies on traditional pawn transactions where customers pledge items for loans, though specific loan terms, interest rates, and APRs are not detailed on the available website content. The perfect seller rating on Buya is positive, though the sample size of 451 transactions may be limited relative to larger pawn chains.

pros: Perfect 100% seller rating on Buya.com marketplace with 451 transactions completed
Dual licensing: both pawn and firearm licenses reviewed by Federal Heights Police
Owner Dani Mays has family background in the pawn business, indicating industry experience
Specializes in high-value items (gold, diamonds, Swiss watches) with expert appraisal potential
Convenient hours: Mon-Sat 11AM-7PM, Sun 12PM-5PM for accessibility
Operates on both physical storefront and online marketplace (Buya.com) for flexibility
Physical business location in Federal Heights, CO provides local community access
cons: No specific interest rates, loan terms, or fee structures disclosed on website
Small operation with limited transaction history (451 sales) compared to established chains
Website lacks customer testimonials or reviews beyond the Buya.com rating
No details provided about loan-to-value ratios, repayment terms, or loan duration options
Limited information about how pawn loans work or what happens if items are not redeemed
best_for: Local Federal Heights, CO residents needing quick cash against collateral
Individuals with high-value items (jewelry, watches, electronics) to pledge or sell
Buyers searching for discounted secondhand luxury goods and gold/diamond jewelry
People seeking to buy or sell firearms through a licensed, police-reviewed dealer
diagnosis: CASH 4U PAWN is best for Colorado residents near Federal Heights seeking immediate cash via pawn loans or those looking to buy/sell secondhand high-value items like jewelry and watches. The main caveat is the absence of publicly disclosed loan terms, interest rates, and fees—prospective borrowers must contact the shop directly to understand the true cost of borrowing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
